mapper.insert: INSERT INTO pipeline_definition (name, description, status, failure_policy, created_at) VALUES (#{name}, #{description}, #{status}, #{failurePolicy}, NOW())
mapper.select: SELECT d.id AS def_id, d.name AS def_name, d.description AS def_description, d.status AS def_status, d.failure_policy AS def_failure_policy, d.created_at AS def_created_at, j.id AS job_id, j.pipeline_definition_id AS job_definition_id, j.job_name, j.job_type, m.execution_order AS job_execution_order, j.preset_id AS job_preset_id, mp.name AS job_preset_name, j.config_json AS job_config_json, j.parameter_schema_json AS job_parameter_schema_json, j.created_at AS job_created_at FROM pipeline_definition d LEFT JOIN pipeline_job_mapping m ON m.pipeline_definition_id = d.id LEFT JOIN pipeline_job j ON j.id = m.job_id LEFT JOIN middleware_preset mp ON mp.id = j.preset_id WHERE d.id = #{id} ORDER BY m.execution_order
SELECT id, name, description, status, failure_policy, created_at FROM pipeline_definition WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY created_at DESC
mapper.update: UPDATE pipeline_definition SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
